message:
perf: default visual FX off and improve mobile scroll handling

- App.tsx: Improved scroll lock - now targets .app-body in addition to
  body, and only locks on mobile when list drawer is open
- main.tsx: Avoid unnecessary viewport CSS variable updates by checking
  if dimensions actually changed; removed visualViewport scroll listener
- main.tsx: Added SW update handler with reload loop guard via sessionStorage
- registerSW.ts: Wait for controllerchange event (or 1500ms fallback)
  before reloading to prevent loading back into old caches
- createWebStore.ts: Default glow and backgroundEffects to OFF for all
  users (v8 migration). This fixes the flickering issue by defaulting
  to performance mode - users can re-enable in Settings if desired.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
